text:
**Found the root cause.** `useGasFeeEstimations` defaults to `true` in the Relay SDK client. This means the SDK's `adaptViemWallet` **will forward the stale `maxFeePerGas`, `maxPriorityFeePerGas`, and `gas` from the quote** directly to the wallet. These are set at quote time and become stale by execution time, causing inflated gas fees.

The fix is to pass `useGasFeeEstimations: false` when creating the Relay client, so the SDK lets the wallet estimate gas natively.
